## Session: Quantification in History

<!--March 16, 2026 -- 14:15-18:00 -- Room U302 ([Akrinn](https://maps.app.goo.gl/neGSMmi15nzrfNyr5), Kalvskinnet)-->

Instructor: [Francisco J. Beltrán Tapia](https://fjbeltrantapia.github.io)

\vspace{1em}

Welcome to quantitative methods in history! As part of the course **Introduction to historical theory and methods** (HIST1505/HIST1515), this session provides a practical introduction on how historians can use computational tools to learn about the past.

::: {.callout-important}
### Important warning
Please follow the [instructions](instructions.html) to prepare the session in advance. 

:::
